Weight Loss

Clinically supervised
weight management

A personalized approach built around your health history, realistic goals, and real provider oversight — including GLP-1 receptor agonist evaluation for eligible patients.

Book a Visit
Our Approach

A structured path to
your goals

Initial Evaluation

  • • Comprehensive health history review
  • • Realistic goal-setting based on your profile
  • • Provider consultation discussing clinical options

Medication-Assisted

  • • GLP-1 receptor agonist evaluation
  • • Prescription management with dosing oversight
  • • Ongoing review for effectiveness and side effects

Ongoing Monitoring

  • • Scheduled progress check-ins
  • • Plan adjustments based on your response
  • • Periodic lab monitoring of metabolic markers
Common Questions

What to expect

Am I eligible for GLP-1 medication?
Eligibility is determined on a case-by-case basis during your initial evaluation. Your provider will review your health history, current medications, and goals.
Do I need a referral?
No referral is needed. You can book directly through our patient portal.
How often are follow-up visits?
Follow-up frequency depends on your treatment type and how you're responding. Your provider will set a schedule that works for your plan.
Are lab costs included?
Lab costs are separate from visit fees. Your provider will discuss what labs are needed and approximate costs during your visit.
Can this integrate with my primary care?
Absolutely. If you're also a primary care patient with MBS Medical, your weight loss program is managed alongside your other conditions by the same provider.

Take the first step

Book your initial evaluation and start working with a provider who builds a plan around your goals.

Book a Visit

Telehealth medical care across Florida. Cash pay, no insurance. Same-week appointments.
